error_signature: custom properties not appearing in HubSpot node
title: Custom properties not visible in HubSpot Update node
symptom: The user cannot see the custom properties in the HubSpot Update node's fields, even when the internal name is used.
applies_when: Trying to update a custom property
not_this_if: Custom properties are visible in the dropdown
root_cause: By default, the HubSpot Update node only displays default properties. Custom properties must be explicitly selected from the 'Add Field' dropdown under 'Custom Properties' to be accessible.
fix_steps: Open the HubSpot Update node settings.
Navigate to Update Fields and select 'Add Field'.
Choose 'Custom Properties' from the dropdown to access custom fields.
agent_instruction: Select 'Custom Properties' from the Update Fields dropdown in the HubSpot node settings.
